---
title: "Day 3 — Temporally-explicit SDMs with TemporalModelR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Day 3 — Temporally-explicit SDMs with TemporalModelR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r child = "../Day3_TemporalModelR.Rmd"}
```
